SEO.title: WB24 — Smart vending service with telemetry, payment and fiscalization
SEO.description: WB24 is a cloud platform for automating the vending business in Ukraine and Moldova. Real-time telemetry, online payment via internet acquiring (QR/NFC, cards, Google Pay, Apple Pay), fiscalization through PRRO, open API.
SEO.keywords: vending fiscalization, vending machine fiscalization, PRRO for vending, machine monitoring, telemetry for vending machines, personal account for vending, online payments, payment by phone, QR checks, NFC payments, storage rooms, automatic storage lockers, parcel terminals, micromarkets, wb24

Hero.title: WB24 Platform —
Hero.subtitle:
Software for vending management
real-time 24/7
Hero.intro: WB24 is a cloud platform for managing vending machines: real-time telemetry, online payment via internet acquiring (QR/NFC) and sales fiscalization.

features.2: Online payment via QR or NFC
features.5: Management of all vending network types

Telemetry.title: Telemetry and management
Telemetry.description: Telemetry and management of vending equipment is used for monitoring both a single vending machine and large networks in various directions

5.title: Service vending machines
5.description: (tickets, information, photo, copy, automatic storage lockers, post machines)

EquipmentIntegration.title: Equipment
EquipmentIntegration.description: You can connect your equipment and integrate it via API or use a ready-made solution developed specifically for the service.
EquipmentIntegration.gsm_desc: module for exchange, management, and data transfer to the wb24.biz service
EquipmentIntegration.tft_desc: contactless reader and information/payment terminal for cashless payments with NFC/QR support, fiscalization, and receipt issuing
EquipmentIntegration.desc1_full: The Kit Box Master telemetry controller provides complete control and management of the vending machine, connection of the acquiring terminal and other equipment, cloud fiscalization of sales, and application of loyalty systems and promotions.
EquipmentIntegration.tft_full_desc: Can be both in an overhead case and built into the machine case. Connecting an acquiring terminal allows you to make payments via nfc/QR, fiscalize receipts displayed on the screen.

EquipmentDeviceDialog.title: GSM-wb24 Telemetry Module
EquipmentDeviceDialog.desc1: Module for data exchange, management and transmission to wb24.biz service
EquipmentDeviceDialog.desc1_full: GSM-wb24 telemetry module solves the task of complete control of the state and management of the vending machine, and data transmission to the wb24.biz service. Connecting an acquiring terminal and other equipment allows you to make payments via nfc/QR, fiscalize receipts displayed on the screen
EquipmentDeviceDialog.tft_desc: Contactless reader and information-payment terminal for cashless payments with NFC/QR support, fiscalization and receipt issuing
EquipmentDeviceDialog.tft_full_desc: Can be both in an overhead case and built into the machine case. Connecting an acquiring terminal allows you to make payments via nfc/QR, fiscalize receipts displayed on the screen.
EquipmentDeviceDialog.desc2: Supports vending protocols MDB, Executive (Price Holding and Standard), DEX/UCS, DDCMP and is compatible with more than 250 models of vending machines and coffee machines.

FunctionalFeatures.title: Functional features
FunctionalFeatures.description: Using our service will allow your vending business to be monitored online 24/7, optimize and minimize equipment downtime, as well as significantly reduce maintenance costs and increase revenues.

payment.title: Accept payments via acquiring system
payment.description: Accept payments through all available acquiring systems (Visa, MasterCard, Google Pay, Apple Pay)

fiscal.title: Fiscalize sales to meet local law requirements
fiscal.description: Sales fiscalization and fiscal receipt issuance ensures compliance with legislation

emergency-alerts.title: Receive notifications about all emergency and abnormal situations
emergency-alerts.description: Timely notifications in Telegram will allow you to respond quickly and reduce equipment downtime

service-alerts.title: Receive advance notifications about required service and product replenishment
service-alerts.description: Automated notifications, configured by the user, and timely service will keep the equipment running without stopping

analytics.title: Make decisions based on analysis of equipment operation statistics and sales volumes
analytics.description: Network/equipment analytics helps make the right marketing decisions

access-control.title: Configure and restrict information access for partners and employees as you see fit
access-control.description: Each user should only have access to information that matches their status and responsibilities

remote-release.title: Remotely release goods in case of equipment failures
remote-release.description: In case of equipment failures, products can be released remotely in the required quantity, reducing customer dissatisfaction and improving competitive ranking

remote-restart.title: Remotely restart equipment in case of failures
remote-restart.description: If an error occurs that can only be fixed by rebooting the equipment, this can be done remotely

remote-update.title: Remote software updates
remote-update.description: Fixing software errors and updates can be done remotely through the personal account

real-time.title: Track sales in real time
real-time.description: Stay up to date with sales volumes in real time to respond quickly to demand changes

inventory.title: Monitor product, consumables, and ingredient availability
inventory.description: Timely replenish consumables and ingredients to avoid downtime and increase sales

alerts.title: Track failures and emergency situations
alerts.description: Receive timely information about failures and emergencies for prompt resolution

security.title: Respond quickly to hacking and vandalism attempts
security.description: Security system enables quick response to hacking and vandalism attempts, ensuring your equipment's protection

remote.title: Change equipment settings remotely
remote.description: Change equipment settings remotely without visiting the location, saving time and resources

temperature-control.title: Manage temperature and react promptly to critical temperature changes and leaks in equipment
temperature-control.description: Heating or cooling of equipment/goods requires monitoring and remote control, and timely notification can prevent damage/deterioration

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.description: Answers about WB24 — vending telemetry, payments, fiscalization and pricing.

what.question: What is WB24?
what.answer: WB24 is a cloud platform for managing and automating a vending business. It provides real-time telemetry and monitoring, cashless online payments and sales fiscalization. WB24 works with a single machine or a large network 24/7.

machines.question: Which vending machines does WB24 support?
machines.answer: Any vending machine with the MDB, Executive or DEX/UCS protocol: coffee and water machines, snack machines and micro-markets, self-service car washes and laundries, technical-fluid machines, parcel terminals, automatic storage lockers and attractions. You can connect your own equipment via API or use ready-made WB24 hardware.

rro.question: Do I need a fiscal recorder (RRO) for vending?
rro.answer: Currently WB24 supports a software PRRO with QR receipts shown on screen, so a separate physical RRO is not required. Fiscalization complies with the legislation of Ukraine and Moldova.

payments.question: How can customers pay at a vending machine with WB24?
payments.answer: WB24 works through internet acquiring — no physical payment terminal is used on the machine. The customer scans a QR code on the machine's screen or taps their phone on the NFC tag to open the acquiring operator's payment page, and pays online (Visa/MasterCard cards, Google Pay, Apple Pay).

offline.question: Does WB24 work without an internet connection?
offline.answer: Yes. The on-machine module caches operations while offline and transmits them automatically once the connection is restored, so no sales data is lost.

price.question: How much does WB24 cost?
price.answer: WB24 has a free plan (€0) for 1 machine, 1 user and 1 cash register with up to 100 days of order history. The Optimal plan starts at €0.10 per machine per day and adds workgroups, acquiring and Telegram integrations. The Premium plan starts at €2.60 per machine per month from 30 machines. An individual license is available by agreement.

integration.question: Can I integrate WB24 with my own software?
integration.answer: Yes. WB24 has an open API and integrates with acquiring systems and Telegram. You can connect existing equipment via the API or use a ready-made WB24 solution.

hardware.question: What hardware does WB24 offer?
hardware.answer: WB24 offers the GSM-WB24 module and the Kit Box Master telemetry controller for full machine control, acquiring-terminal connection and cloud fiscalization, plus a TFT module — a contactless NFC/QR payment and information terminal with a 2.8" screen, available as an overhead case or built in.

alerts.question: How does WB24 notify operators about failures?
alerts.answer: WB24 sends instant Telegram notifications about failures, emergencies, vandalism attempts and required service or replenishment, so operators can respond quickly and minimize downtime.

languages.question: What languages and regions does WB24 support?
languages.answer: WB24 is built for vending operators in Ukraine and Moldova, and the interface is available in Ukrainian, English and Russian. Customer support is provided in all three languages.
